name: QVAC Playground
summary: Build, run and share serverless on-device AI apps with the QVAC SDK write QVAC code, run it instantly in your browser, share it as a link that arrives running. Every answer comes with a receipt that proves itself genuine.

description.p: QVAC is Tether's local AI SDK one interface over 13 AI capabilities that runs on a personal device with no cloud. Here it is encoded native to Hologram OS (ADR-0067): the contract, not the package.

Every capability call passes the fail-closed conscience gate, runs over the browser-native engine, and seals a re-derivable PROV-O inference receipt. The default reference brain always runs with no download; bind Holo Q (QVAC WebGPU) for a real on-device model.

ul: On-device, private, serverless no key, no cloud
An OpenAI-compatible server answered with no server
Every answer is a re-derivable receipt (Law L5)

releases.description: The QVAC SDK (docs.qvac.tether.io) encoded native to Hologram OS (ADR-0067): one self-verifying contract over Tether's local AI SDK its 13 AI capabilities, the model lifecycle, the runtime, P2P delegation and the OpenAI-compatible server satisfied by the substrate. Every call is conscience-gated (ADR-033), runs over the browser-native engine (a deterministic reference brain now; Holo Q / QVAC WebGPU when a model is bound), and seals a re-derivable inference receipt (Law L5). Serverless, lean, anchored in the UOR substrate. Encoded, not vendored; honest where weights are absent.
